name: Create NEXO Primitive
description: Choose and scaffold the correct NEXO artifact type: personal script, skill, personal plugin, schedule-only change, or core repo change.
steps: Read docs/agent-product-playbook.md, docs/personal-artifacts-manual.md, and docs/runtime-templates.md before deciding anything.
Decide first whether the need is a core repo change, personal plugin, personal skill, personal script, or schedule-only change.
Use the shipped template from templates/ instead of inventing a new scaffold.
Keep product code in the repo and personal artifacts under NEXO_HOME; do not blur the boundary.
Validate the resulting artifact with the canonical runtime command (skills sync/apply, scripts doctor/reconcile, plugin load/list) before claiming it is ready.
gotchas: Do not create a plugin when a script plus schedule is enough.
Do not create a scheduled artifact by editing LaunchAgents directly.
Do not create personal artifacts whose names shadow core product identities.
Do not scaffold from memory when docs/runtime-templates already define the contract.
